---
title: "Coral del Mar presented an oral session on 'Creating Safe Spaces within ESA'"
date: "2024-08-08"
description: "Coral del Mar presents on creating safe spaces within ESA as incoming Chapter Chair of the ESA Latin American and Caribbean Chapter."
image: /images/news/ESA_TALK.jpeg
categories: [Team]
---

As incoming Chapter Chair for the ESA Latin American and Caribbean Chapter, Coral del Mar presented in a contributed oral session focused on creating safe spaces for early career professionals within ESA.
